789.reason: 当 getPreReadTokenType(2) 返回 null 时，比较结果为 true，可能导致死循环或逻辑错误；应增加对 null 的检查。

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  当 getPreReadTokenType(2) 返回 null 时，比较结果为 true，可能导致死循环或逻辑错误；应增加对 null 的检查。

798.reason: 当当前 token 非空但 getPreReadTokenType(1) 为 null 时，表示文件意外结束，此时循环仍会继续，导致 parseFuncDef() 出错；应增加对 null 的处理或提前跳出。

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  当当前 token 非空但 getPreReadTokenType(1) 为 null 时，表示文件意外结束，此时循环仍会继续，导致 parseFuncDef() 出错；应增加对 null 的处理或提前跳出。
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  // Incorrect condition: should check current token type, not next token; may skip function definitions or cause incorrect parsing.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition is incorrect: it tries to parse FuncDef only when the next token is not MAINTK, but after parsing all Decl, the next tokens could be either FuncDef or MainFuncDef. However, FuncDef starts with FuncType (not MAINTK), so this loop should run when we see FuncType tokens, not just "not MAINTK". This may cause FuncDef to be skipped or misparsed.]

790.reason: // Incorrect condition: using lookahead offsets that may not correctly identify the start of a function definition or main; also may cause premature termination or infinite loop.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  // Incorrect condition: using lookahead offsets that may not correctly identify the start of a function definition or main; also may cause premature termination or infinite loop.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [The lookahead logic is flawed: it assumes that if the next token isn't MAINTK and the one after isn't LPARENT, then it must be a Decl. However, FuncDef starts with FuncType (VOIDTK/INTTK/CHARTK) followed by IDENFR and LPARENT, so this condition may incorrectly include FuncDef tokens in Decl parsing or skip valid declarations.]

1970.reason: [Incorrect TokenType used for the missing right parenthesis ')'. It should be TokenType.RPARENT instead of TokenType.LPARENT.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Incorrect TokenType used for the missing right parenthesis ')'. It should be TokenType.RPARENT instead of TokenType.LPARENT.]

982.reason: [The token type should be TokenType.RPARENT instead of TokenType.LPARENT when creating a synthetic token for a missing right parenthesis.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The token type should be TokenType.RPARENT instead of TokenType.LPARENT when creating a synthetic token for a missing right parenthesis.]
